name: Competitive Intel → Market Brief
description: Researches the competitors you name and writes up where you stand against them. Tells you what they are pushing, where they are weak, and where you can win.
prompt_template: Research the competitors I name below. Look at how they position themselves, what they charge, what they emphasize, and where customers seem unhappy. Write a brief that lays out each one, then summarizes where I have an opening and what I should say differently to stand out. Keep it readable and skip the filler. Give it to me as a draft to review.
